description_long: This object consists of three white pillar candles of varying heights, grouped closely together. Each candle features a visible flame at the top, with a darkened wick at the center of the flame. The surface of the candles is textured with realistic wax drips running down the sides, giving the impression of partially melted wax. The candles are cylindrical, with slightly irregular edges and a matte, semi-soft appearance. There is no visible holder or base; the candles appear to stand directly on a flat surface. The overall look is classic and decorative, suitable for creating a cozy or atmospheric ambiance in an urban setting.
description: A group of three white pillar candles with visible flames and wax drips, standing together without a holder. The candles vary in height and have a realistic, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candles, with the tallest in the center and wax drips clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the height difference and the rounded, textured surfaces of the candles.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tallest candle in the center and the wax drips visible on the back sides.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the staggered arrangement and the flames atop each candle.
